purpose: Extreme close-up swatch of cream/foundation/balm. Texture-as-subject.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Extreme macro photography of {product_color} cream swatch filling entire frame, swooping curved smear catching dramatic side light revealing texture peaks valleys and glistening highlights, warm earthy palette {color_descriptor}, no product visible no logo just pure texture as subject, hyper-realistic surface detail at sub-millimeter scale, shot on 100mm macro at f/8, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: grow, defend. Source code in research corpus: T41. Saudi adaptation guidance: Excellent feed-aesthetic for Saudi premium beauty. Texture-only chains carry no cultural risk. Reference image: Recommended. Recommended frequency: 1-2 per week.
